image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about deliberate practice than social media does.
Context visual: Deliberate practice isn't just about repetition. It's a focused way to improve.
Escalation visual: Think of it as setting specific goals and receiving feedback. That's the key!
Evidence visual: Research shows that just practicing isn’t enough. It's the quality of practice that matters.
Payoff visual: So, next time you pick up a skill, remember: deliberate practice can transform your abilities.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into the science of learning? Follow for more insights!
